scripts.ci:root: npm run compile && npm run test
scripts.ci:backend: npm --prefix backend install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.ci:frontend: npm --prefix frontend install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.ci:workflow: npm --prefix cre-workflow install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix cre-workflow run build
scripts.ci:cre-dry: npm --prefix backend install --no-audit --no-fund && CRE_SIM_MODE=mock npm --prefix backend run ci:dry-sim
scripts.ci:all: npm run ci:root && npm run ci:backend && npm run ci:frontend && npm run ci:workflow && npm run ci:cre-dry
